## UpdateCompanyInput variable

Zod schema for updating an existing company. All fields are optional for partial updates.

**Signature:**

```typescript
UpdateCompanyInput: z.ZodObject<
	{
		name: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>>>
		email: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodPipeline<z.ZodString, z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Email'>>>
	},
	'strip',
	z.ZodTypeAny,
	{
		name?: (string & z.BRAND<'Name'>) | undefined
		email?: (string & z.BRAND<'Email'>) | undefined
	},
	{
		name?: string | undefined

	}
>
```
